display.name: Azure SQL Database Overview
display.description: Overview of Azure SQL Database

display.name: azuremonitor.subscription_id
display.description: Subscription ID for your Azure Account

display.name: name
display.description: Azure SQL Database name

display.name: Successful Connections
display.description: Number of successful connections.

display.name: Availability
display.description: Database availability percentage.

display.name: Replication Lag
display.description: Geo-replication lag (RPO) in seconds; primary database only.

display.name: Workers Percentage
display.description: Worker threads in use as a percentage of the limit.

display.name: Sessions Count
display.description: Number of active sessions.

display.name: Sessions Percentage
display.description: Active sessions as a percentage of the limit.

display.name: Blocked by Firewall
display.description: Number of connection attempts blocked by the firewall.

display.name: Data IO Percentage
display.description: Data file IO usage as a percentage of the limit.

display.name: Deadlocks
display.description: Number of deadlocks.

display.name: Data Space Used
display.description: Data space used by the database.

display.name: Failed Connections (User Errors)
display.description: Number of failed connections caused by user errors.

display.name: Log Backup Storage Size
display.description: Cumulative transaction log backup storage size.

display.name: SQL Instance CPU Percentage
display.description: Total CPU usage (user + system) of the SQL instance.

display.name: Differential Backup Storage Size
display.description: Cumulative differential backup storage size.

display.name: Data Space Allocated
display.description: Data space allocated to the database (includes unused space).

display.name: Log IO Percentage
display.description: Transaction log write throughput as a percentage of the limit.

display.name: CPU Percentage
display.description: Percentage of CPU used by the database workload, relative to its limit.

display.name: Full Backup Storage Size
display.description: Cumulative full backup storage size.

display.name: Failed Connections (System Errors)
display.description: Number of failed connections caused by system errors.

display.name: In-Memory OLTP Storage Percentage
display.description: In-Memory OLTP storage used as a percentage of the limit.

display.name: Data Space Used Percentage
display.description: Data space used as a percentage of the maximum data size.

display.name: SQL Instance Memory Percentage
display.description: Memory usage of the SQL instance as a percentage of its limit.
